tvShow.name: The Hawk
tvShow.overview: On the back nine of his career, golf legend Lonnie "The Hawk" Hawkins chases one final major — and drags everyone he loves into the chaos.

episodes.name: The Hawk
episodes.overview: After experiencing a tragedy on the course, past-his-prime golfer Lonnie Hawkins decides to make one last stand to achieve his career Grand Slam.

episodes.name: The Family That Plays Together
episodes.overview: As the golf world gathers for a tearful farewell, Lonnie infuriates Lance and Stacy by choosing the fairway over the funeral home.

episodes.name: Roses & Thorns
episodes.overview: When Lonnie's game begins to waver, Sam helps him reconnect with his roots. Natalie tries to overcome Stacy's smothering presence on the green.

episodes.name: Tears of a Hero
episodes.overview: Lonnie's triumphant return to the PGA Tour is dampened by a Danish rival. Lance and Natalie host an engagement party to remember.

episodes.name: The Prison Yard
episodes.overview: Lonnie lands a magazine cover that leaves his entire circle seething. Sam's past finally catches up with her.

episodes.name: The Genesis Invitational
episodes.overview: Lonnie, Lance and Golden sow chaos on the course when they're paired for a tournament round. An unwelcome discovery pushes Natalie to her limit.

episodes.name: Vegas
episodes.overview: With $3 million on the line, father and son go head-to-head in a simulation golf tournament in Vegas — and all bets are off.

episodes.name: The Code
episodes.overview: In the messy aftermath of the Vegas trip, Lonnie tries to win back Sam's trust, Stacy has complicated feelings and Lance hits rock bottom.

episodes.name: Pebble
episodes.overview: Lonnie revisits the scene of his worst defeat. Stacy and Golden get down to business. Lance gains an enhanced perspective on his daddy issues.

episodes.name: Pickle
episodes.overview: Lonnie, Lance and Golden compete for championship glory at the U.S. Open — where the trophy isn't the only thing being chased.

videos.name: Lonnie insisted we drop this promo for The Hawk too. It’s basically the same as the other two.
Lonnie asked us to post another promo for The Hawk, so here it is.
